_comment: Single-token English/legal words that collide with tiny entries in city dictionaries (GeoNames-based). When the deny-list pass would emit one of these as a standalone `address` hit, it is dropped — almost certainly a Purchase Price / European Union / Effective Time false positive, not a real place. Multi-token matches (e.g. 'Lake Union, WA') are unaffected because the filter only fires on single-token spans.
_it_comment: Italian additions are conservative: only common-noun Italian words that collide with city dictionary entries. Real Italian cities are NOT listed; multi-token spans (`Via Trieste`, `41012 Modena`) are unaffected.
